briefing:
## 🌍 Top 5 Global Fintech News

- **[Fintech founder charged with fraud; AI app found to be humans in the Philippines](https://techcrunch.com/2025/04/10/fintech-founder-charged-with-fraud-after-ai-shopping-app-found-to-be-powered-by-humans-in-the-philippines/)** — *Hacker News* — A fintech founder faces fraud charges after their supposedly AI-powered shopping app was revealed to be operated by human workers in the Philippines.

- **[Americans see their savings vanish in Synapse fintech crisis](https://www.cnbc.com/2024/11/22/synapse-bankruptcy-thousands-of-americans-see-their-savings-vanish.html)** — *Hacker News* — Thousands of Americans lost access to their savings following the bankruptcy of fintech middleware firm Synapse, highlighting the risks of uninsured fintech deposit structures.

- **[Goodbye Visa and Mastercard: 130M Europeans switching to sovereign payment](https://www.lesnumeriques.com/banque-en-ligne/adieu-visa-et-mastercard-130-millions-d-europeens-basculent-vers-un-paiement-100-souverain-des-2026-n250918.html)** — *Hacker News* — Some 130 million Europeans are shifting to a domestically controlled payment network, marking a significant move toward payments sovereignty away from U.S. card networks.

- **[Open Banking and Payments Competition](https://www.bitsaboutmoney.com/archive/open-banking-and-payments-competition/)** — *Hacker News* — A deep-dive analysis explores how open banking frameworks are reshaping competitive dynamics in the payments industry.

- **[Apple acquires UK open banking startup Credit Kudos](https://ffnews.com/newsarticle/apple-acquires-uk-open-banking-startup-credit-kudos/)** — *Hacker News* — Apple made a strategic move into open banking by acquiring UK-based Credit Kudos, signalling big tech's growing interest in financial data infrastructure.

---

## 🍁 Top 5 Canadian Fintech News

- **[Wealthsimple wants to expand its banking to kids and businesses](https://www.cbc.ca/news/business/wealthsimple-launching-kids-businesses-9.7207296?cmp=rss)** — *CBC Business* — Canadian fintech leader Wealthsimple is broadening its banking offering to include accounts for children and business clients, deepening its push into everyday financial services.

- **[Canada's moment to build](https://betakit.com/canadas-moment-to-build/)** — *BetaKit* — A new piece makes the case that Canada is at a pivotal opportunity to invest in and grow its domestic technology and innovation ecosystem.

- **[There is no sovereignty without technology](https://betakit.com/there-is-no-sovereignty-without-technology/)** — *BetaKit* — A commentary argues that Canada's economic and political sovereignty depends fundamentally on building its own technology capabilities.

- **[Yanik Guillemette Warns Bill C-22 Could Trigger a Major Tech Investment Exodus From Canada](https://financialpost.com/globe-newswire/yanik-guillemette-warns-bill-c-22-could-trigger-a-major-tech-investment-exodus-from-canada)** — *Financial Post* — A growing coalition of global tech and cybersecurity leaders warns that Canada's proposed Bill C-22 risks driving significant technology investment out of the country.

- **[Canada calls screen scraping 'unsecure,' sets Open Banking target for 2023](https://finledger.com/2021/08/09/canada-sets-open-banking-target-for-2023/)** — *Hacker News* — Canada flagged screen scraping as a security risk and set an open banking implementation target, a foundational moment in the country's ongoing open banking journey still resonating today.

---

## 🌊 Bonus: Relevant to Atlantic Fintech's Focus (1–3 articles)

- **[From the ashes of Ubisoft Halifax, an indie studio rises to revive Atlantic Canada's gaming industry](https://betakit.com/from-the-ashes-of-ubisoft-halifax-an-indie-studio-rises-to-revive-atlantic-canadas-gaming-industry/)** — *BetaKit* — A new indie studio born from the closure of Ubisoft Halifax is working to reignite Atlantic Canada's tech and creative industry ecosystem — a story of regional resilience relevant to Atlantic Fintech's ecosystem-building mission.

- **[Fintech dystopia](https://fintechdystopia.com/)** — *Hacker News* — This resource catalogues cautionary tales of fintech gone wrong, offering important context for ecosystem builders and regulators focused on responsible fintech development in Atlantic Canada.

- **[Cold front](https://betakit.com/cold-front/)** — *BetaKit* — BetaKit's latest feature examines the cooling conditions facing Canadian startups, with implications for fintech venture capital and startup growth across the country, including Atlantic Canada.
